problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Combining Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
